name: PoupeIIe Of ChimneyTown VR ～into the world～
short_description: It is VR Anime of the big hit picture book "PoupeIIe Of ChimneyTown". You must try this at least once.
detailed_description:
“Believe. Even if you’re the only one.”

* It has been partially updated. We will continue to update.

◆detail
We have reproduced the story of the popular picture book "PoupeIIe Of ChimneyTown" in VR.
You can enjoy old and young men and women with content of about 20 minutes storytelling content.
It is designed to be hard to get drunk and is recommended for VR beginners.

◆prologue
There was a town isolated from the outside world, surrounded by a 4,000 meter tall cliff.
The town was full of chimneys.
Smoke rose from everywhere, clouding the sky above.
Smoke, smoke, from morning till night.
The people living in the chimney town were encaged in black smoke,
and did not know about the blue sky.
They did not know about the shining stars.…

◆Production
vLab
